subject: [PATCH v5 4/5] sunrpc: tear down pool counters before dropping the pool map reference

2026-07-06.patch_summary: This patch fixes a potential memory leak in the sunrpc service by reordering the destruction of pool counters and the dropping of the pool map reference. The original order caused issues when the last pooled service was destroyed, as it would skip destroying the percpu counters. The patch ensures that the pool counters are destroyed while the pool map is still referenced, preventing a memory leak.
